userMessage:
Build a TekAutomate flow from this conversation:
User requests:
- not jsut inpection add fastfram etc
AI plan summary:
I can build that as a compact TekAutomate flow.

Flow outline:
- set up the requested configuration
- run the requested acquisition or checks
- save or query the requested results

Say `build it` and I’ll turn that into an applyable Steps UI flow.

IMPORTANT: Return ACTIONS_JSON. Use tek_router({action:"build", query:"<summary>"}) to generate verified steps.
The workspace already has 8 steps. ADD to the existing flow using insert_step_after — do NOT replace_flow.
Wrap new steps in a group (type:"group") with a descriptive name.
Insert at the end of the flow (targetStepId:null).
Format: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"...","actions":[{"action_type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":null,"newStep":{"type":"group","label":"<Group Name>","children":[...steps...]}}]}
Return as ACTIONS_JSON: {...}

response.text:
